author: Carlos Lopez Jr. <clshortfuse@gmail.com> (https://shortfuse.org/)

cocopi.apiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the ChatGPT Codex backend API.

cocopi.authMode.description: Credential source for extension runtime requests.

cocopi.chatInstructions.description: Additional instructions to apply to Cocopi chat requests. Combine with the configured mode in cocopi.chatInstructionsMode.

cocopi.chatInstructionsMode.description: How to merge cocopi.chatInstructions with built-in chat instructions.
enumDescriptions: Do not send configured instructions unless explicitly replacing the default instructions.
Replace the default instructions entirely with chatInstructions.
Append chatInstructions to the default instructions.
Apply chatInstructionsRegexPattern/Replacement to default instructions before sending.

cocopi.chatInstructionsRegexFlags.description: Regex flags to use for cocopi.chatInstructionsRegexPattern when mode is regex.

cocopi.chatInstructionsRegexPattern.description: When cocopi.chatInstructionsMode is regex, the pattern to match in instructions.

cocopi.chatInstructionsRegexReplacement.description: When cocopi.chatInstructionsMode is regex, the replacement text for matched instruction content.

cocopi.chatParticipantModelSource.description: Model source for @cocopi chat participant requests.
enumDescriptions: Use VS Code's currently selected Cocopi chat model for @cocopi requests, falling back to cocopi.model when the selected model is not from Cocopi.
Always use the cocopi.model setting for @cocopi requests.

cocopi.compactionFallbackStrategy.description: Compaction threshold to use when no model-provided limit is available, or when model-provided limits are disabled.
enumDescriptions: Use 90% of the usable input budget after reserving max output tokens.
Use the model context window minus max output tokens, delaying VS Code compaction until near the hard limit.

cocopi.debugLevel.description: Controls privacy-safe Cocopi output-channel diagnostics for Codex response handling.
enumDescriptions: Do not write response debug diagnostics.
Write response completion metadata, usage/cache counters when present, and unknown response keys.
Also write each Responses stream event type. Does not log prompts, output text, tokens, or account ids.
Write full request, wire request, stream event, and failure payload JSON. This can include prompt and output text; auth tokens are still redacted.

cocopi.editProgressIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between elapsed-time edit progress updates while streamed edit tool arguments are still being generated. Set to 0 to disable timed edit progress.

cocopi.issueTracking.description: Enable private Cocopi diagnostic entries for runtime anomalies and cache diagnostics.

cocopi.inlineCompletions.enabled.description: Enable Cocopi AI inline completions. When enabled, Cocopi sends limited editor context around the cursor to the selected Codex model as you type.

cocopi.inlineCompletions.model.description: Codex model id for Cocopi AI inline completions. Use 'auto' to prefer a Spark-like low-latency catalog model when available, falling back to cocopi.model.

cocopi.inlineCompletions.maxPrefixCharac.description: Maximum characters before the cursor to send with Cocopi inline completion requests.

cocopi.inlineCompletions.maxSuffixCharac.description: Maximum characters after the cursor to send with Cocopi inline completion requests.

cocopi.inlineCompletions.timeoutMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for a Cocopi inline completion stream before timing out. Set to 0 to disable the inline completion idle timeout.

cocopi.model.description: Codex model id to request by default.

cocopi.reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for Cocopi requests. Request-specific model options still override this setting.
enumDescriptions: Use the model catalog default when available.
No reasoning.
Minimal reasoning.
Fast responses with lighter reasoning.
Balances speed and reasoning depth for everyday tasks.
Greater reasoning depth for complex problems.
Extra high reasoning depth for complex problems.

cocopi.reasoningSummary.description: Reasoning summary behavior for Cocopi requests. Request-specific model options still override this setting.
enumDescriptions: Use Codex auto summary mode to show the most detailed available reasoning summaries when the model supports them.
Use the model catalog default when available.
Do not show reasoning summaries.
Show concise reasoning summaries.
Show detailed reasoning summaries.

cocopi.serviceTier.description: Advanced processing tier override for Cocopi requests.
enumDescriptions: Standard processing.
Flexible processing when available.
Priority processing when available.

cocopi.streamIdleTimeoutMs.description: Milliseconds to wait for Responses stream activity before timing out. Set to 0 to disable the idle timeout.

cocopi.tokenTracking.description: Enable Cocopi Token Tracker entries for token usage and prompt-cache behavior.

cocopi.showTokenTrackerTimeline.description: Show Token Tracker timeline graphs for local usage and speed over time. This only controls display; use cocopi.tokenTracking to enable or disable recording Token Tracker rows.

cocopi.tokenTrackerTimelineDays.description: Local calendar days shown in Token Tracker timeline graphs. Stored timestamps remain UTC; graph buckets use local calendar time so daylight-saving changes are represented correctly.

enumDescriptions: Show unified local usage and speed graphs averaged across all models and reasoning settings.
Show graphs split by selected model and reasoning settings.
Show both unified and model/reasoning split graphs.

cocopi.toolStrict.description: Send VS Code tool schemas to Codex with strict structured-output validation enabled. Request-specific tool options can override this setting.

cocopi.transport.description: Responses transport used for Codex requests.
enumDescriptions: Use the HTTP/SSE Responses transport.
Use the Responses WebSocket transport.

cocopi.useModelDefaultCompactionLimit.description: Use the model-provided auto_compact_token_limit as VS Code's compaction threshold when available.

description: VS Code extension that bridges VS Code Chat with Codex backend servers.
name: cocopi

scripts.assets:render: npm run assets:status-font && npx --yes @resvg/resvg-js-cli --fit-width 128 media/icon.svg media/icon.png && npx --yes @resvg/resvg-js-cli media/promo.svg media/promo.png
scripts.assets:status-font: npx --yes svgtofont --sources media/status-icons --output out/status-font --fontName cocopi && node -e "fs.copyFileSync('out/status-font/cocopi.woff', 'media/cocopi.woff')"
scripts.package:check: npm run types && node scripts/check-package.js && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.package:vsix: npm run types && node scripts/check-package.js && node scripts/package-vsix.js
scripts.types: node -e "fs.rmSync('types', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.types.json
scripts.validate: npm run check && npm run lint && npm run package:check && npm run coverage
